Title: Enacts the "Shirley Myers White Right To Reconciliation and Digital Identity Repair Act"
Summary: Enacts the "Shirley Myers White Right To Reconciliation and Digital Identity Repair Act"; establishes a right for individuals to have outdated, inaccurate, or incomplete public and digital narratives corrected once a legal matter is resolved; requires institutions to provide mechanisms for context, updates, and correction so that individuals are not permanently penalized by disproven or obsolete information in digital and automated systems.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to enacting the "Shirley Myers White Right To Reconciliation and Digital Identity Repair Act"
